libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25, apply the Netty/Unsafe runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as well as 5.0.0: `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. Meaningful core coverage can use an in-process Vert.x `HttpServer` with `WebClient`, forms/multipart, redirects, cookies/session, and body codecs; no external service or Docker image is normally required. Avoid OAuth2-specific APIs unless intentionally adding the optional `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` module.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the Java 25 runtime properties are sufficient.
OAuth2WebClient references an optional dependency, but core WebClient coverage does not require it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 remains a local/in-process HTTP client test target, but it resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and likely needs the same Java 25 native runtime system properties already used for 5.0.0.
